webPreview.banner: Preview mode - file transfers require the desktop app.
webPreview.transferUnavailable: File transfer is not available in the web preview. Download the desktop app to send and receive files.

webPromo.platforms: AltSendme is available as desktop, Android, CLI, and web.
webPromo.notice: Web version doesn't support direct connections - traffic is relayed through encrypted public relays and speeds are throttled. Your files stay encrypted either way. Use the desktop/CLI app or custom relays for a better experience.
webPromo.linksLabel: Get the desktop app and project links

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

sender.title: Send
sender.subtitle: Share files or folders via encrypted peer-to-peer connections.
sender.sendThisTicket: Send this ticket to the person who wants to receive your file
sender.keepAppOpen: Keep this app open while others download your files
sender.pleaseWaitProcessing: Please wait while we process your files for sharing...
sender.orBrowse: or browse to select files or folders

on.label: You are broadcasting
on.description: Multiple people with the ticket can download files concurrently in broadcast mode.

off.label: Private sharing
off.description: Only the person you share the ticket with can download the file.

receiver.title: Receive Files
receiver.subtitle: Download files from sender using encrypted peer-to-peer connections over the internet.
receiver.browserDownloadsHint: This browser cannot pick a save folder. Files will download to your default downloads location.
receiver.instruction1: Sender must be online and sharing a file
receiver.instruction2: Get a ticket from the sender
receiver.instruction3: Paste the ticket in the text area
receiver.instruction5: Files will be saved to your selected folder
receiver.keepAppOpen: Keep this app open while downloading files
receiver.downloadCompletedWithConflicts: Download completed with name conflicts resolved

transfer.wasStopped: The transfer was stopped before completion.
transfer.successMessage: Your transfer has been completed successfully.

autoCheckUpdates.label: Automatically check for updates
autoCheckUpdates.description: The app will automatically check for updates on startup

minimizeToTray.label: Minimize to system tray
minimizeToTray.description: When close dialog, minimize the app instead of terminate

showProgressOnIcon.label: Show transfer progress on app icon
showProgressOnIcon.description: Using a progress bar overlay on the app icon to indicate transfer progress

runOnSystemStartup.label: Run on system startup
runOnSystemStartup.description: Automatically launch the app when the system starts

contextMenu.label: Explorer context menu
contextMenu.description: Add 'Send with AltSendme' to the Windows Explorer right-click menu

showToggle.label: Show broadcast toggle while sharing
showToggle.description: Display a broadcast switch on the sharing screen so multiple receivers can download the same files at once.

relay.title: Relay servers
relay.description: Control which iroh relay servers AltSendme uses for NAT traversal and encrypted fallback connections.
relay.modeDefaultDesc: Use the default public iroh relays. Best for most users.
relay.modeCustomDesc: Use your own relay server(s). See deploy/relay in the project repo.
relay.modeDisabledDesc: Do not use relays. Direct connections only; may fail across strict NATs.
relay.urlsDescription: Add one or more HTTPS relay URLs for regional failover.
relay.urlVerifyFailedHint: Could not connect to this relay
relay.verifyAuthHint: If your relay requires an auth token, make sure it matches access.shared_token on the server.
relay.authTokenPlaceholder: Shared secret if your relay requires authentication
relay.authTokenDescription: Required when your relay uses access.shared_token in its config.
relay.fallbackDescription: Choose what happens when your custom relay cannot be reached.
relay.fallbackStrictDesc: Fail the transfer instead of switching to public relays. Best for private setups.
relay.fallbackPublicDesc: Fall back to public iroh relays when custom relays are unreachable.
relay.privacyNote: For a fully private setup, configure the same relay URLs on both sender and receiver devices.
relay.verifySuccessDescGeneric: Successfully registered with your configured relay server.
relay.urlRequired: Add at least one relay URL.
relay.disabledHint: Enable automatic or custom relays to test connectivity.
relay.confirmDisableDescription: You've chosen to disable relays. File transfers may fail if you try to share files with someone outside your local network. Relays help devices find & connect across difficult network conditions, and your transfers always stay end-to-end encrypted.
relay.confirmCustomDescription: You've chosen to use custom self-hosted relays. If your custom relays are unreachable, transfers will automatically fall back to public relays and you'll be notified. Relays only help your devices connect across difficult network conditions, and your transfers always stay end-to-end encrypted.
relay.confirmCustomDescriptionWithPolicy: You've chosen to use custom self-hosted relays. If they are unreachable, AltSendme will follow the fallback policy selected in Relay settings. Relays only help your devices connect across difficult network conditions, and your transfers always stay end-to-end encrypted.

updater.noUpdatesDescription: You are already using the latest version

relay.fellBackToPublic: Custom relay unreachable, using public relay instead.
relay.fellBackToastSend: Your custom relay was unreachable — this transfer is using a public relay instead.
relay.fellBackToastReceive: Your custom relay was unreachable — this download is using a public relay instead.
relay.dialogDescription: Shows which relay server this app is currently using for connections.
relay.purpose: Relays only help your devices find each other and connect.
relay.directNote: Once a direct connection is established, files transfer directly between devices, and the relay is no longer used.
relay.lanNote: On the same local network, relays are skipped entirely.
relay.encryptedNote: Transfers are always end-to-end encrypted, so relays never see your files.
relay.disabledNote: Relays are off. Direct connections only, so transfers may fail across strict firewalls or NATs.
